response.overview: In a world where dreams intertwine with television fame, a young actress faces profound alienation and the loss of her identity when her iconic character begins to blur the boundaries of her own existence. As boundaries disappear and mirrors reflect a foreign face, she experiences a growing disconnection from herself and the fruit of her labor. As fans and colleagues mistake her for her fictional alter-ego, stripping her of her individuality, she enters an internal struggle to reclaim her essence, challenging the limits between fiction and the reality of her own existence and fighting to take control of her destiny before disappearing completely under the shadow of her character.
response.title: Elisa
